prompt: A [construction stage] of a [building type] — [lens] wide, the [construction stage] at its most visually complex, [structural system] exposed and legible before the finishes that will conceal it, [construction workers] at human scale within the structure, [light quality] the working light of a construction site — harsh, practical, specific, [material detail] visible: steel connections, concrete formwork, timber framing — the building in the state it will never be seen in again once complete, documentary construction still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
